hook.summary: A live-action shot of hands fanning out playing cards, building anticipation for a winning hand.
hook.visual_action: Hands fan out a deck of cards, revealing a near-perfect spade sequence.

scene_flow: Live-action hands fanning poker cards, attempting to complete a Royal Straight Flush.
Graphic transition with bold yellow background and Korean text.
In-game poker footage featuring a player reaction and a winning hand.
Fast-paced motion graphics montage with poker symbols and 'dopamine' themed text.
Final gameplay screen showing a massive chip win and the game logo.
audience_proxy: Korean men 25-45 who enjoy the thrill of social casino games and competitive poker.
